title: Barbell Back Squat
description: Drive hips back and down past parallel, keeping a proud chest and driving through the mid-foot.

title: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
description: Push hips straight back with a slight knee bend, stretching the hamstrings while keeping a neutral spine.

title: Overhead Barbell Press
description: Press the barbell straight up overhead, locking the core out and finishing with the head pushed through at the top.

title: Weighted Pull-Up
description: Pull from a dead hang position until your chin clearly clears the bar without using excessive body english.

title: Hang Power Clean
description: Execute a violent triple extension at the hips, knees, and ankles, aggressively catching the bar across the front rack position.

title: Continuous Depth Jumps
description: Step off a plyometric box and instantly explode vertically off the floor, minimizing ground contact time.

title: Rotational Medicine Ball Slam
description: Pivot sharply and throw a non-bouncing medicine ball forcefully down into the floor outside your front foot.

title: Sled Push (Heavy)
description: Maintain a strict 45-degree forward lean and punch knees dynamically forward, driving your feet into the turf.

title: Flying 30-Meter Sprints
description: Smoothly build up speed for 20 meters, target absolute maximal velocity for 30 meters, and decelerate safely.

title: Pro Agility Shuttle (5-10-5)
description: Sprint 5 yards to the right, drop your hips to plant and change direction, sprint 10 yards left, plant, and sprint 5 yards through.
